title: zephyranthes lineata
intro: Zephyranthes lineata, also known as the striped zephyr lily or striped magic lily, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaryllidaceae. Traditionally, Zephyranthes lineata has been used in folk medicine, particularly in tropical regions, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, colds, and respiratory problems, and its health benefits also extend to wound healing and reducing inflammation. Zephyranthes lineata is typically prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and its leaves and flowers are also used in traditional medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
